---
title: "Software"
echo: false
jupyter: python3
section-divs: false
---

```{python}
#| label: "software"
#| id: "software"
#| output: asis
import yaml
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, HTML

import re

def slugify(text):
    # Convert text to lowercase
    text = text.lower()
    # Remove special characters and spaces
    text = re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9]+', '-', text)
    # Remove leading and trailing hyphens
    text = text.strip('-')
    return text
    
def button(url, str, icon):
    icon_base = icon[:2]
    return f"""<a class="btn btn-outline-dark btn-sm", href="{url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
        <i class="{icon_base} {icon}" role='img' aria-label='{str}'></i>
        {str}
    </a>"""

yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(open("software.yaml"))

for idx, data in enumerate(yaml_data):
    # Generate a unique ID for each project using a slugified title and an index
    unique_id = slugify(data["title"]) + f"-{idx}"
    
    # Start a flex container to align logo on the left and content on the right
    display(HTML(f"""
    <div style='display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 20px;'>
        <!-- Logo container -->
        <div id="logo-{unique_id}" style="display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <img src="{data.get('logo', '')}" style="max-height: 300px; height: auto; width: auto;">
        </div>
        <!-- Content container -->
        <div style="flex: 1;">
            <h2><code>{data["title"]}</code></h2>
            <p>{data["description"]}</p>
            {" ".join([
                button(data.get('website', ''), "Website", "bi-info") if "website" in data else "",
                button(data.get('github', ''), "Github", "bi-github") if "github" in data else "",
                button(data.get('package', ''), "Package", "bi-box-seam") if "package" in data else ""
            ])}
        </div>
    </div>
    """))

# Add JavaScript to dynamically adjust logo height based on text content height
display(HTML("""
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    // Loop through all logo containers
    document.querySelectorAll('[id^="logo-"]').forEach(logoContainer => {
        const content = logoContainer.nextElementSibling; // Get the content container
        const logo = logoContainer.querySelector('img'); // Get the logo image
        if (logo && content) {
            // Set the logo height to match the content height
            logo.style.height = `${content.offsetHeight}px`;
        }
    });
});
</script>
"""))
```
